# Knowledge as Reliabilism

**Node Type:** synthesis
**Node ID:** d3bf71fb-61a1-4e02-8243-ffa4b882f1df
**Depth:** 5
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [Can sensitivity handle self-fulfilling beliefs?](can-sensitivity-handle-self-fulfilling-beliefs-antithesis-c7eafdac-6dac-49b6-82d3-75023a069245.md)

## Content

**Knowledge is a true belief produced by a reliable cognitive process**, **A person knows a proposition if their belief is generated by a process that reliably yields true beliefs in relevant environments**, **For a person to know a proposition, it is necessary that the proposition is true**, **For a person to know a proposition, it is necessary that they believe the proposition**
